title: Skill & orchestrator docs: unified super-epic narrative
description:
Rewrite the skill's super-epic material as one consistent big-picture story (design §8). Blocks on the orchestration epic because the docs must reflect shipped behavior.

SKILL.md 'Roadmaps' becomes a unified section covering roadmaps + projects + buckets + dates with worked examples (show, not mandate). agent-runner.md gains the recursive-frontier / project-checkpoint rule. Convention ladder + container Definition-of-Ready land in tick-patterns.md or a new references/big-picture.md. Single-epic Steps 0–5 untouched.

Deliverables:
- rewritten SKILL.md big-picture section + 3 worked examples (dated release / nested projects / passive bucket)
- agent-runner.md stopping-rule update
- convention ladder + container DoR reference
